_comment: SHA-256 hashes of exact known-sensitive strings (relay/home public IPs, the relay WireGuard public key). Plaintext is intentionally absent — secret-scan.mjs hashes candidate tokens and matches against this list, so these exact values are caught even if a generic rule is later loosened. Add a hash with: node -e 'console.log(require("crypto").createHash("sha256").update(process.argv[1]).digest("hex"))' '<value>'
